competitors.name: GitHub Copilot
competitors.raw_snapshot:
# GitHub Copilot Marketing Copy & Feature Descriptions

## Agent & Autonomous Features

**Headline:** "Ship faster with AI that work alongside you"

**Description:** "Assign tasks to agents like Copilot, Claude by Anthropic, and OpenAI Codex, and let them plan, explore, and execute work autonomously in the background."

**Key Capability:** The platform enables independent task execution without constant user supervision, allowing developers to maintain workflow while agents handle complex operations.

## Multi-File & Workspace Context

**Capability Statement:** System examines "code in your editor—focusing on the lines just before and after your cursor, but also information including other files open in your editor and the URLs of repositories or file paths to identify relevant context."

**Contextual Processing:** For chat functions, the extension creates prompts combining "your prompt with additional context including the code file open in your active document, your code selection, and general workspace information, such as frameworks, languages, and dependencies."

## Background Execution

**Feature:** "Copilot cloud agent" enables users to "plan, build, and execute complex workflows powered by your GitHub context."

**Enterprise Context:** Organizations can "Track activity with detailed audit logs and enforce governance by managing agents from a single control plane."

## Session & Conversation Threading

**Technical Need:** "Retaining prompts and suggestions is necessary for chat on github.com, mobile, and CLI Copilot because those features' effectiveness depends on using thread history to improve responses."

**Data Retention:** Prompts retained for 28 days across non-IDE platforms to maintain conversation continuity.

## Integration Points

Available across: GitHub, VS Code, Visual Studio, JetBrains IDEs, Neovim, and terminal environments.

# GitHub Copilot Marketing Copy & Feature Descriptions

## Agent & Autonomous Features

**Headline:** "Ship faster with AI that work alongside you"

**Description:** "Assign tasks to agents like C

changes.description: 主页 headline 从 "Command your craft" 变更为 "Ship faster with AI that work alongside you"，定位从「匠艺工具」转向「AI 协同伙伴」
changes.evidence: 「Ship faster with AI that work alongside you」

changes.description: "Copilot cloud agent" 正式命名并配备企业级控制平面：统一管理所有 agent、审计日志全覆盖、单一入口治理
changes.evidence: 「Copilot cloud agent enables users to plan, build, and execute complex workflows powered by your GitHub context. Track activity with detailed audit logs and enforce governance by managing agents from a single control plane.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #1：AI cloud agent session 在企业统一协议下运行；锚点 #4：单一控制平面跨工具管理所有 agent session，与 meee2 F9 跨 session 协调层高度重叠

changes.description: 跨平台（github.com/mobile/CLI）的 session thread history 保留 28 天，强化跨工具 session 连续性基础设施
changes.evidence: 「Retaining prompts and suggestions is necessary for chat on github.com, mobile, and CLI Copilot because those features' effectiveness depends on using thread history to improve responses.」
changes.meee2_relevance: 锚点 #4：跨工具（IDE/web/mobile/CLI）的 session 连续性，基础设施层面与 meee2 跨 session artifact pull 方向一致

key_findings: 主页定位从 "Command your craft" 升级为 "Ship faster with AI that work alongside you"，AI 协同叙事全面取代工具叙事
Copilot cloud agent 企业控制平面上线：单一入口管理所有 agent session + 审计日志，已具备 meee2 跨 session 协调层的企业版雏形
跨 IDE/web/mobile/CLI 的 28 天 thread history，session 连续性基础设施持续深化
上次报告中的 Copilot Spaces 和多模型支持（Claude/GPT-5 mini/Haiku 4.5）在本次页面抓取中未见，可能已整合或重新定位

alerts.headline: Copilot cloud agent 企业控制平面上线：统一管理所有 agent session + 审计日志，向 meee2 跨 session 协调层直接靠拢
alerts.evidence: 「Copilot cloud agent enables users to plan, build, and execute complex workflows powered by your GitHub context. Track activity with detailed audit logs and enforce governance by managing agents from a single control plane.」
alerts.action_suggestion: 重点追踪 Copilot cloud agent 控制平面是否开放 API 允许第三方 session 接入；若出现「人 session + AI session 同一控制平面」的协议描述，威胁等级应升至 crit。同时关注本次抓取中消失的 Copilot Spaces 是否已整合进 cloud agent 架构，这可能意味着跨工具 artifact 共享能力在悄悄深化。
